name: Garlic Chicken Pot
recipeIngredient: 7 ounce package of Chinese sausage (Dynasty), sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, marinate the chicken with 2 tablespoons of cornstarch and 2 tablespoons of low sodium soy sauce. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or longer.
2. In a large non-stick skillet, cook the chicken, onion, and sausage over medium heat until the chicken is nearly cooked through.
3. Add the chicken broth and 1/4 cup of low sodium soy sauce to the skillet. Stir well and continue cooking until the chicken is fully cooked. The broth should thicken slightly.
